allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['path']\) for f in data.get\('tree',[]\) if not f['path'].startswith\('.'\)]")

PowerShell(gh api repos/ta2-svg/yoru/contents/index.html?ref=gh-pages | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty content | ForEach-Object { [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\([System.Convert]::FromBase64String\($_ -replace "`n",""\)\) })

PowerShell($content = gh api repos/ta2-svg/yoru/contents/index.html?ref=gh-pages | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty content; [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\([System.Convert]::FromBase64String\($content.Replace\("`n",""\)\)\))
